items.headline: Eos pre-announces preliminary Q2: revenue $68–69M (>3× shipments YoY), gross-margin loss −69/−73%, ~$364M cash
items.summary: Preliminary, unaudited Q2 (ended Jun 30): record revenue of $68–69M on a more-than-threefold YoY jump in shipments; gross-margin loss narrowing to −69% to −73% (from −78% in Q1); total cash incl. restricted ~$364M. First quarter with both Line 1 and Line 2 commercial — Line 2 posting yield/cycle times ahead of Line 1. Full audited Q2 earnings scheduled Jul 29.

items.headline: Eos Energy Enterprises Appoints Cybersecurity and Software Leader Haiyan Song to Board of Directors, Names Marie Martin Chief Legal Officer in Planned Transition
items.summary: Song brings deep technology, cybersecurity, software, edge computing, and digital infrastructure expertise as Eos scales American-made energy storage for an increasingly complex grid Pittsburgh-based Martin brings two decades of legal…

items.headline: Frontier Power USA Converts 920 MWh Battery Storage Project Portfolio Under Stella Strategic Framework
items.summary: FPUSA converted a 920 MWh portfolio (Blanquilla, Aransas Pass, Nash, Wallis) under its Stella Energy Solutions framework — further reservation-to-pipeline conversion in ERCOT. Total FPUSA pipeline cited at ~16 GWh (~2.7 GWh high-probability); closing contingent on the rights-offering funding.
